$comment: Canonical changelog. releasedAt: UTC with trailing Z (npm run changelog:now). Site shows your local time + UTC.

releases.title: Keystone admin console typography
releases.summary: Semantic type roles and compose utilities for keystone.intrinsicvalue.llc — tables, tabs, and monospace IDs at a readable admin scale instead of ad-hoc text-xs and text-sm.

sections.label: Added
items: Keystone typography tokens: body, label, tab, tableCell, tableCode (15px body; labels at 14px).
Foundation mono font stack (--intrinsic-font-mono) for ID and audit columns.
Users list acceptance specimen on the reference site /themes page.

sections.label: Documented
items: Admin console typography rules in patterns/LIST_DETAIL.md.

sections.label: Migration
items: Replace text-xs / text-sm in admin UI with .iv-* classes.

releases.title: Version badge sync
releases.summary: The reference site reads its version from npm/tokens-css/package.json so the homepage always matches the published package.

sections.label: Changed
items: Reference site version badge reads from the published tokens-css package.

releases.title: Reliable token publishing
releases.summary: GitHub Actions can publish @intrinsicvalue-llc/tokens-css without a separate npm PAT when org workflow permissions are configured.

sections.label: Fixed
items: Publish workflow auth for GitHub Packages.
Tokens publish via GITHUB_TOKEN from the design repo.

releases.title: First GitHub Packages release
releases.summary: Web apps install design tokens from GitHub Packages using the @intrinsic/tokens-css npm alias.

sections.label: Added
items: First publish of @intrinsicvalue-llc/tokens-css to GitHub Packages.

releases.title: Intrinsic Design launch
releases.summary: Company-wide tokens, themes, patterns, voice, and ADRs — with generated CSS, npm package, Swift SPM, and the reference site.

sections.label: Added
items: Foundation tokens and product themes (Tasteful, Keystone, intrinsic-www).
Generated CSS (dist/, npm/tokens-css) and IntrinsicDesign Swift package.
Pattern and voice specs; reference site at design.intrinsicvalue.llc.
